description: When experimental.self_hosted_cache is enabled, Baseline-Interpreter frames produced via OSR (on-stack replacement) didn't carry the REALM_INDEPENDENT flag. Intrinsic helpers (SetIntrinsicOperation) walked into JSScript::containsPC which assumed the script pointer was still valid in the current realm, but the OSR-d frame was from the cached realm-independent self-hosted script → null/garbage script pointer, segfault in containsPC<4ul>. sec-high (csectype likely UAF). Fix: set REALM_INDEPENDENT on OSR'd frames when self_hosted_cache is enabled (git 4b63805dcd90 r=iain, Phabricator D253387, 6-line BaselineFrame.cpp + .h).
